zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hill於1523年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Hill20歲，母親Margaret Fauntleroy18歲。他於1545年與Agnes Webb在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hill于1523年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert Hill20岁，母亲Margaret Fauntleroy18岁。他于1545年与Agnes Webb在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hill was born in 1523, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Hill, was 20 and his mother, Margaret Fauntleroy, was 18. He married Agnes Webb in 1545, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1556, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hillが1523年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hillは20歳，母Margaret Fauntleroyは18歳であった。1545年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンでAgnes Webbと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hill(이)가 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Hill(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fauntleroy(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 Agnes Webb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hill родился в 1523 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Hill было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fauntleroy, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Webb в 1545 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1556 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.
